name: Artur
description: Artur (Artur Hilaj), known professionally as Artur or Artur DB, is an Albanian rapper, singer, and songwriter from Kukës, Albania. Born on 30 May 1994, he is a hip-hop/rap artist known for releasing singles and albums in the genre. His music appears on major streaming services and includes solo tracks like "Miliona", "Pa Refren", "FMF (Fuck Money Fame)", and "O Shqipe". Artur often blends modern rap with Albanian cultural influences. He is also known for collaborations with other artists, for example "Policia" and "Do Shoke" with Elia, "Anormala" (feat. Slitta & Flipp), and songs with Double T such as "Pse po rren" and "Fol Drejt", showcasing his frequent teamwork with fellow Albanian rappers in the scene.
